creator: Kirsten Korosec, Russell Brandom
title: (No AI) SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know
dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec, Russell Brandom
content: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.
contentSnippet: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

creator: Ram Iyer
title: (No AI) Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
dc:creator: Ram Iyer
content: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.
contentSnippet: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.

title: (No AI) Siri is good now??
author: David Pierce
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/VST_0612_Site.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

You'd be forgiven for thinking this day would never come. Siri has spent a decade and half somewhere between "sort of useful at a few things" and "utterly disastrous, why did I even try, can it honestly not even set a timer." But the wildest thing just happened: Apple [put out a new version of Siri](https://www.theverge.com/tech/942416/apple-siri-ai-update-wwdc), and it actually [seems to be pretty good](https://www.theverge.com/tech/947432/siri-ai-apple-intelligence-ios-27-wwdc).

On [this episode of _The Vergecast_](https://pod.link/vergecast), David and Nilay talk about their early experiences with Siri AI, and what it means for users, and the rest of the AI industry, for the iPhone's built-in assistant to be good enough at most things. There's very little about Siri AI that feels bleeding edge or brand new, but …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/podcast/949079/siri-ai-good-vergecast)

title: (No AI) Elon Musk is the world’s first trillionaire
author: Stevie Bonifield
content:
![Elon Musk with zeros and money falling from the sky.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/STKE012_SPACEX_IPO_2026_D.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Elon Musk's net worth has passed the trillion-dollar mark after [SpaceX's IPO](https://www.theverge.com/science/947926/spacex-ipo-stock-shares-trading-elon-musk). His net worth, which was hovering around $800 billion before the IPO, includes the value of his 4.8 billion shares in SpaceX, along with his wealth from his other companies, like Tesla. Shares of SPCX opened at $150 and have remained well above the $138 benchmark that gives Musk a 13-figure net worth.

SpaceX combined Musk's [rocket, AI, and social media platforms](https://www.theverge.com/tech/872619/elon-musk-merges-spacex-with-xai-and-x) earlier this year, and said [in its S-1](https://www.theverge.com/business/902219/spacex-ipo-details) that its goal is to "build the systems and technologies necessary to make life multiplanetary, to understand the true nature of the universe, and to extend the light …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/948409/elon-musk-trillionaire-spacex-ipo)

title: (No AI) New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
content: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

title: (No AI) How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
content: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.

creator: Molly Taft
title: (No AI) China Didn't Make People Hate Data Centers
dc:creator: Molly Taft
content: GOP lawmakers, tech investors, and even OpenAI have tied the anti-data center movement in the US to Chinese interference. Experts say it’s much more complicated than that.
contentSnippet: GOP lawmakers, tech investors, and even OpenAI have tied the anti-data center movement in the US to Chinese interference. Experts say it’s much more complicated than that.

creator: Brian Barrett
title: (No AI) You Probably Won’t Get Rich Off the SpaceX IPO
dc:creator: Brian Barrett
content: The company has set aside an unusually high number of shares for retail investors. Still, experts say, you’re just getting the crumbs.
contentSnippet: The company has set aside an unusually high number of shares for retail investors. Still, experts say, you’re just getting the crumbs.
